Name: Chicken Stock
Ingredients: Chicken carcass; Carrots; Celery; Onion; Garlic; Bay leaf; Thyme; Parsley; Peppercorns; Water
Description: A clear, flavourful broth of simmered chicken bones and aromatic vegetables, the foundation for soups and sauces.

Name: Beef Stock
Ingredients: Beef bones; Carrots; Celery; Onion; Garlic; Bay leaf; Thyme; Peppercorns; Water; Salt
Description: A rich brown broth of roasted beef bones and root vegetables, the base of French brown sauces.

Name: Vegetable Stock
Ingredients: Carrots; Celery; Onion; Leek; Garlic; Bay leaf; Thyme; Parsley; Peppercorns; Water
Description: A light, versatile vegan broth of simmered vegetables and herbs.

Name: Fish Stock
Ingredients: Fish bones; White wine; Shallots; Leek; Bay leaf; Thyme; Parsley; Peppercorns; Water
Description: A delicate broth of fish bones and white wine, used in seafood sauces and bisques.

Name: Dashi Stock
Ingredients: Kombu; Dried bonito flakes; Water
Description: Japanese kombu and bonito broth — the clean umami backbone of Japanese cuisine.

Name: Veal Stock
Ingredients: Veal bones; Carrots; Onion; Celery; Tomato paste; Garlic; Bay leaf; Thyme; Water
Description: A rich, gelatinous broth of roasted veal bones, the starting point for classical French sauces.

Name: Tomato Sauce
Ingredients: Tomatoes; Garlic; Onion; Olive oil; Basil; Sugar; Salt; Black pepper
Description: A versatile Italian-style cooked tomato sauce of garlic, onion and fresh basil.

Name: Béchamel Sauce
Ingredients: Butter; Flour; Milk; Nutmeg; Salt; Black pepper
Description: One of the five French mother sauces — a silky white sauce of butter, flour and milk.

Name: Hollandaise Sauce
Ingredients: Butter; Egg yolks; Lemon juice; White wine vinegar; Salt; Cayenne pepper
Description: A French emulsion of egg yolks and butter, rich and tangy, served with eggs Benedict.

Name: Chimichurri
Ingredients: Parsley; Garlic; Red wine vinegar; Olive oil; Chili flakes; Oregano; Salt
Description: An Argentinian herb sauce of parsley, garlic, vinegar and olive oil for grilled meats.

Name: Pesto
Ingredients: Basil; Pine nuts; Parmesan; Garlic; Olive oil; Salt
Description: A Ligurian sauce of fresh basil, pine nuts, Parmesan, garlic and olive oil.

Name: Tzatziki
Ingredients: Yogurt; Cucumber; Garlic; Dill; Lemon juice; Olive oil; Salt
Description: A Greek yogurt dip with grated cucumber, garlic and dill.

Name: Mole Sauce
Ingredients: Dried chilies; Tomatoes; Onion; Garlic; Dark chocolate; Cumin; Cinnamon; Chicken Stock; Oil; Salt
Description: A complex Mexican sauce of dried chilies, dark chocolate and over a dozen spices.

Name: Romesco Sauce
Ingredients: Roasted red peppers; Tomatoes; Almonds; Garlic; Olive oil; Red wine vinegar; Smoked paprika; Salt
Description: A Catalan sauce of roasted peppers and almonds with smoked paprika and sherry vinegar.

Name: Mayonnaise
Ingredients: Egg yolks; Oil; Lemon juice; Mustard; Salt
Description: A rich cold emulsion of egg yolks, oil, lemon and mustard.

Name: Peanut Sauce
Ingredients: Peanut butter; Coconut milk; Soy sauce; Lime juice; Garlic; Ginger; Chili; Brown sugar
Description: A South-East Asian coconut and peanut butter sauce with soy, lime and chili.

Name: Teriyaki Sauce
Ingredients: Soy sauce; Mirin; Sugar; Garlic; Ginger; Cornstarch
Description: A Japanese glaze of soy sauce, mirin and sugar for glazing chicken and salmon.

Name: Harissa
Ingredients: Dried red chilies; Garlic; Caraway seeds; Cumin; Coriander; Olive oil; Lemon juice; Salt
Quantities: 100g; 4 cloves; 1 tsp; 1 tsp; 1 tsp; 50ml; 1 tbsp; 1/2 tsp
Description: A fiery North African chili paste of dried red peppers, garlic and spices.

Name: Tahini Sauce
Ingredients: Tahini; Lemon juice; Garlic; Water; Salt
Description: A Middle Eastern dressing of sesame paste, lemon juice and garlic.

Name: Red Curry Paste
Ingredients: Red chilies; Lemongrass; Galangal; Garlic; Shallots; Kaffir lime leaves; Coriander; Cumin; Shrimp paste
Description: A Thai paste of dried red chilies, lemongrass and galangal, the base of red curries.

Name: Green Curry Paste
Ingredients: Green chilies; Lemongrass; Galangal; Garlic; Shallots; Coriander; Kaffir lime leaves; Cumin; Shrimp paste
Description: A Thai paste of fresh green chilies, lemongrass and coriander, used in coconut green curries.

Name: Sofrito
Ingredients: Tomatoes; Bell pepper; Onion; Garlic; Olive oil; Parsley; Salt
Description: A Spanish and Latin American base of sautéed onion, garlic, tomato and bell pepper.

Name: Mirepoix
Ingredients: Onion; Carrots; Celery; Butter; Bay leaf; Thyme; Salt
Description: The French aromatic base of diced onion, carrots and celery cooked gently in butter.

Name: Velouté
Ingredients: Butter; Flour; Chicken Stock; Salt; White pepper
Description: A French mother sauce of butter, flour and chicken stock.

Name: Espagnole
Ingredients: Beef Stock; Mirepoix; Tomato paste; Red wine; Flour; Butter; Thyme; Bay leaf
Description: A rich French brown sauce of beef stock, mirepoix and tomato paste.

Name: Demi-Glace
Ingredients: Espagnole; Veal Stock; Thyme; Bay leaf
Description: A deeply concentrated French sauce made by reducing veal stock and Espagnole.

Name: BBQ Sauce

Name: Tartare Sauce
Ingredients: Mayonnaise; Capers; Pickles; Parsley; Lemon juice; Dill; Shallots

Name: Aioli
Ingredients: Mayonnaise; Garlic; Lemon juice; Salt

Name: Remoulade
Ingredients: Mayonnaise; Mustard; Capers; Pickles; Parsley; Lemon juice; Salt
Description: A French cold sauce of mayonnaise, mustard, capers and herbs.

Name: Garam Masala
Ingredients: Cumin; Coriander; Cardamom; Cinnamon; Cloves; Black pepper; Nutmeg
Description: A North Indian warming spice blend of cumin, cardamom, cinnamon and cloves.

Name: Ras el Hanout
Ingredients: Cumin; Coriander; Cinnamon; Cardamom; Turmeric; Paprika; Allspice; Cloves; Ginger; Nutmeg
Description: A complex Moroccan spice blend whose name means top of the shop.

Name: Baharat Blend
Ingredients: Allspice; Black pepper; Coriander; Cumin; Cinnamon; Cardamom; Nutmeg; Cloves
Description: A Middle Eastern spice blend of allspice, coriander and cinnamon.

Name: Ground beef/lamb
Ingredients: Ground beef; Ground lamb
Description: A blend of ground beef and lamb mixed for kebabs, burgers and stuffed pastries.

Name: Ground beef/pork
Ingredients: Ground beef; Ground pork
Description: A European blend of ground beef and pork for meatballs and meat sauces.

Name: Ground chicken/beef
Ingredients: Chicken; Ground beef
Description: A lighter mixed mince of chicken and beef for patties and stuffed dishes.

Name: Sancocho (base)

Name: Souvla (base)

Description: The West African spiced broth base of njansang seeds for pepper soup.

Description: Chinese BBQ pork marinated in hoisin, soy and five-spice and roasted until lacquered.
